results.rendered_html:
sam-pra-√dṛś (cf. sam-pra√paś) Pass. -dṛśyate (˚ti), to be clearly seen or observed, appear,  MBh. ;  R. ;  Hariv.  :
Caus. -darśayati, to cause to see, show, indicate, declare (ātmānam mṛta-vat, ‘to feign one's self dead’),  ib.  &c.
